company.stepSubtitle: You can do it now or later in workspace settings. The product works either way.
company.optionCompanyDesc: We'll fill in the details by tax ID (INN/BIN) — useful later for payments and documents.
company.optionSkipDesc: Go straight to the workspace. You can add a company anytime.
company.sectionEmpty: Company details are not filled in. You can add them — they'll be useful later for payments and documents. Nothing is required.
company.searchHint: Start typing a name, INN or BIN — we'll autofill the details.
company.notConfigured: Auto-search is unavailable. Enter details manually.
company.nothingFound: Nothing found. You can enter details manually.
